creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
While upgrading via 

portmaster
portupgrade

and 

'make reinstall' in /usr/ports/graphics/ImageMagick

I receive the following error message. I can not update prior installed ports nor can I reinstall ImageMagick after I deleted the port and try reinstalling.

This happens on ALL SMP boxes running FreeBSD 8.0-CURRENT/amd64 I have at the moment. My private old UP box running FreeBSD 8.0-CURRENT/amd64 also does not show this issue, though I use the same 'make config' setup and nearly the same environment.

Appended, one will find the error message and the containment of the errornous test-suite-log file.


---

verageImages  Magick++/tests/coalesceImages  Magick++/tests/coderInfo  Magick++/tests/color  Magick++/tests/colorHistogram  Magick++/tests/exc
eptions  Magick++/tests/montageImages  Magick++/tests/morphImages  Magick++/tests/readWriteBlob  Magick++/tests/readWriteImages wand/drawtest 
wand/wandtest
